checks.name: RequireAuth exists and redirects unauthenticated to /login
checks.detail: Canonical guard should handle auth transitions deterministically.

checks.name: RoleGate does not block solely on storage session
checks.detail: Role checks must be based on canonical auth context only.

checks.name: Admin routes are wrapped by RequireAuth and AdminOnly
checks.detail: Admin route access should be explicit and deterministic.

checks.name: Dashboard page does not use unauthenticated redirect effect
checks.detail: Dashboard should not apply independent unauthenticated redirect logic.

checks.name: Credits page does not use unauthenticated redirect effect
checks.detail: Credits should not apply independent unauthenticated redirect logic.
